ops.text: Campaign plan approved 2026-07-19 (plan file: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-16/plans/honest-nulls-negatives-that-crystalline-alpaca.md). Envelope: ~$360 hard caps, ~$260–300 expected, ~3 weeks. Structure: Step 0 prereqs (b998264, auditor-gold v1 mint) → infra F/E/C/A/B/D → E30 instrument lane → Wave 0 (E31–E35 prompt-only) → Wave 1 (E36–E39 watcher-frame FT) → Wave 2 (E40–E42 trajectory/distill/decision) → fable synthesis. House rules bind: pre-registered log per experiment before spend, independent VERIFY per arm, instrument-card decision rule, eval-what-you-serve, mirror corpus only, no experiment ships an artifact (handoffs → 162a5dc). Note: b998264 code fix found already landed (36ca84a5); residual scope = PyPI release + weekly-lane-shaped smoke before Sun 07-26 04:00. Dispatching workflow 1: stats.py (infra F) ∥ auditor-gold v1 mint ∥ b998264 verification.
